title: La ragazza di Piazza San Pietro
writer: Piero Costa, Mario Guerra, Sandro Continenza
actors: Vittorio De Sica, Susana Canales, Walter Chiari
plot: Armando Conforti, his family and his friends have a business: they sell souvenirs near St. Peter's, in Rome, they change dollars, in short they get along. When Armando's son, Paolino, runs away from his boarding school, his sister...
